changes: Blade of Faith potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Blade of Truth potency increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Draw and Junction can now be used to target self and party members (Powder Barrel effect only granted when targeting an enemy).
Soul Resonance now grants the effect Apocatastasis.
Miracle of Nature recast time increased from 25 to 30 seconds.
Afflatus Purgation: Cure potency of the Regen effect granted by Temperance reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Aspected Benefic: Cure potency of Diurnal Benefic increased from 1,000 to 2,000.
Aspected Benefic: Effect duration of Diurnal Benefic increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Aspected Benefic: Barrier potency of Nocturnal Benefic increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Time until the Guard action can be manually disabled increased from 1 to 2.5 seconds.
